root_text.an4.215:1.1: …pe… Micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, micchāsaṅkappo hoti, micchāvāco hoti, micchākammanto hoti …pe… sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, sammāsaṅkappo hoti, sammāvāco hoti, sammākammanto hoti.

translation_text.an4.215:1.1: “Someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there. … wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action. … Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there. … right view, right thought, right speech, right action. …”
